title: Josee, the Tiger and the Fish
posterAlt: Josee, the Tiger and the Fish (2020) movie poster
tmdbOverview: With dreams of diving abroad, Tsuneo gets a job assisting Josee, an artist whose imagination takes her far beyond her wheelchair. But when the tide turns against them, they push each other to places they never thought possible, and inspire a love fit for a storybook.
synopsis: Josee, the Tiger and the Fish is a 2020 animation, drama and romance film from Japan. It holds a solid 7.6 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 12 certification (AT rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
